title: AI Itinerary Planner
welcome: How can I help you shape your next journey?
welcomeDesc: Create intelligent plans customized to your unique style, budget, and timing. Pick a prompt suggestion or start typing below.

placeholders.input: Ask TripGenie about your journey (e.g. 'Plan a 3-day weekend trip to Tokyo')...
placeholders.streaming: TripGenie is designing your customized itinerary...

suggestions.hanoiDesc: Experience the culture of the Old Quarter and unique local traditional foods.
suggestions.saigonDesc: Discover modern lifestyles, bustling night walking markets, and historic sights.
suggestions.phuquocDesc: Relax on beautiful white beaches, enjoy sea sports, and taste local seafood.
suggestions.kyotoDesc: Suggest a 5-day cultural itinerary for Kyoto, Japan temple spots...
suggestions.kyotoPrompt: Suggest a 5-day cultural itinerary for Kyoto, Japan focusing on historical temples and local dining spots.
suggestions.yosemiteDesc: Design a budget-friendly weekend roadtrip to Yosemite park...
suggestions.yosemitePrompt: Design a budget-friendly weekend roadtrip to Yosemite National park including hiking trail guides.
suggestions.romeDesc: Plan a culinary and food tour guide in Rome, Italy. Gelato spots...
suggestions.romePrompt: Plan a culinary and food tour guide in Rome, Italy. Focus on authentic pizza, pasta, and gelaterias.

errors.failedToStream: Could not connect to the AI stream. Please check your network connection.
